productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Daroga Two 11 Lea Brown Casual Shoes
description: From the woods to urban outdoors, keep the adventurous strain thriving in this pair of Daroga Two 11 LEA shoes from adidas. With a durable suede upper and a seamless tongue, this shoe offers exemplary comfort and style.UpperSuede upper with synthetic leather overlaysSeamless contoured tongue for enhanced comfort and styleReinforced synthetic toe cap for enhanced durabilityCentral lacing system for a snug, customised FitHeel pull for easier on and offPadded and removable sockliner for all day comfort and to accommodate an orthoticMidsoleMoulded insole for a more supportive fit and underfoot feelOutsoleTraxion outsole with multi-directional lugs for absolute grip and traction on various surfacesShoe careClean the upper using a suede brushDo not store in direct sunlight
